graphql.query:
{
  fetchVideoClasses (filter:{
      classTypes:[],
      classSubTypes:[],
      mapFilter:[{
          classType:2,
          classSubTypes:[]
      }]
      level:0,
    minutes:0,
      startDate:"",
      endDate:"",
      instructors:[],
      featured:false,
      first:0,
      count:0,
      videoId:0
  }

  ){

    id,
    classType,
    subType,
    level,
    minutes,
    date,
    featured,
    title,
    subTitle,
    newContent,
    overviewImageUrl,
    detailImageUrl,
    featuredImageUrl,
    destination,
    description,
    instructors{
        id,
        name
    }


  }
}

item.name: 53 - Fetch Train Like A Champion Query

graphql.query:
{
  fetchTLAC(
    filter: { collectionId: null, featured: null, first: 0, count: 0 }
  ) {
    id
    title
    description
    subTitle
    logoUrl
    turnstileImageUrl
    collections {
      id
      title
      level {
          id
          title
          colorCode
        }
      featured
      newContent
      description
      subTitle
      overviewImageUrl
      detailedImageUrl
      featuredImageUrl
      videoCount
      personalVideos{
    id,
    category{
        id,
        title,
        newContent
        overviewImageUrl,
        detailedImageUrl
    },
    subCategory{
           id,
        title,
        newContent
        overviewImageUrl
    }
    level{
        id,
        title,
        colorCode
    }
    minutes,
    date,
    featured,
    title,
    subTitle,
    newContent,
    overviewImageUrl,
    detailImageUrl,
    featuredImageUrl,
    destination,
    description,
    instructors{
        id,
        name
        newContent
    }
    shareUrl
  }
  }
    }
    }
